sections.paragraph:
f. in sing. once, Isa 17:14 more often in plur.-

(1) terror, terrors, Job 18:11 24:17 27:20 . 18:14 , תַּצְעִידֵהוּ לְמֶלֶךְ בַּלָּהֹות “terrors shall pursue him like a king,” or military leader (לְ here serves for comparison, Job 39:16 compare Job 15:24, and 27:20 . It is common, but incorrect, to join מֶלֶךְ בַּלָּהֹות king of terrors.)

(2) sudden destruction, compare בֶּהָלָה No. 2; Psa 73:19, תַּמּוּ מִן־בַּלָּהֹות “they perish with sudden destruction;” Eze 26:21, בַּלָּהֹות אֶתְּנֵךְ וְאֵינֵךְ. LXX. ἀπώλειάν σε δώσω, καὶ οὐχ ὑπάρξειζ ἔτι. Vulg. in nihilum redigam te, Eze 27:36 28:19 .
